intro: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow essential oil, is derived from the flowers and leaves of the yarrow plant and is highly valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This oil has been traditionally used to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice in natural remedies. When used topically, yarrow essential oil can help to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from minor skin irritations.
